mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id AS orderId, product_id AS productId, product_name AS productName, product_image AS productImage, sku_id AS skuId, sku_name AS skuName, price, quantity FROM t_order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT id, order_id AS orderId, product_id AS productId, product_name AS productName, product_image AS productImage, sku_id AS skuId, sku_name AS skuName, price, quantity FROM t_order_item WHERE order_id IN
#{oid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, sku_id, sku_name, price, quantity) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productImage}, #{skuId}, #{skuName}, #{price}, #{quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT a.user_id FROM t_order_item oi JOIN t_product p ON oi.product_id = p.id JOIN t_artisan a ON p.artisan_id = a.id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_order_item (order_id, product_id, product_name, product_image, sku_id, sku_name, price, quantity) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.productImage}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.skuName}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity})
